variants: Freyja Bjornsson, a dedicated community member hailing from Mossberry Flats, completed her education at Zinnia Heights College where she honed her skills. Following her graduation, she took on a role at Quarry Lake Ventures, utilizing her proficiency in Bengali script. Freyja is also deeply committed to civic engagement, serving as a volunteer with the Strength in Unity Society. Her experiences growing up in Mossberry Flats have significantly influenced her passion for both her work and volunteer activities, driving her commitment to make a positive impact in her community.
